description_long: This object is a cylindrical can with a bright red exterior and metallic gray top and bottom, resembling a typical single-serving juice can. The surface is mostly smooth and glossy, with a faintly visible seam and subtle highlights that suggest a reflective metal material. On one side, there are partial white graphics and text, possibly part of a brand logo, but the details are not fully legible. The can appears unopened, with a standard pull tab closure on the top. The overall proportions and size are consistent with a standard 330ml beverage can commonly found in urban environments. There are no visible dents, damage, or additional features such as straws or handles.
description: A glossy red cylindrical juice can with metallic gray ends and partial white branding graphics.
description_view_0: The can is shown with its red body and metallic gray top and bottom visible, with no branding details apparent.
description_view_1: This view highlights the smooth red surface and the subtle seam along the can, with the metallic ends still visible.
description_view_2: Partial white graphics and text are visible on the red surface, suggesting branding or a logo.
description_view_3: The metallic pull tab top is clearly visible, with a small portion of the white branding wrapping around the can.
